steps.t: Melethron is at the northern Oathbreaker camp among his fallen men. Idmar asked you to speak with the shade of Melethron.
Thinnas is at the eastern camp of Oathbreakers near the Rushgore. Idmar has asked you to speak with the shade of Thinnas.
Camlann is at the western camp of Oathbreakers near the border to Eorlsmead. Idmar asked you to speak with the shade of Camlann.
Idmar is at his camp along the road in central Parth Celebrant. You should return to Idmar with news of your dealings with the maddened shades.
